Properties.GroupDescription: Security group for API Lambda - allows outbound to RDS Proxy and HTTPS

SecurityGroupEgress.Description: Allow HTTPS outbound for Secrets Manager and S3

rules_to_suppress.reason: HTTPS egress to 0.0.0.0/0 required for Secrets Manager VPC endpoint and S3 access

Properties.Description: Allow Lambda to connect to RDS Proxy

rules_to_suppress.reason: AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole managed policy required for VPC-attached Lambda

S3 bucket permissions use wildcard actions for object operations - required for image upload/download. OpenSearch permissions use wildcard for collection and index access - required for search operations. Bedrock permissions scoped to specific Claude Sonnet 4 model ARN.
Node.js 20 is the latest LTS runtime supported by Lambda at time of implementation
AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole managed policy required for VPC-attached Lambda

S3 bucket permissions use wildcard actions for object operations - required for image upload/download. OpenSearch permissions use wildcard for collection and index access - required for search operations. Bedrock permissions scoped to specific Claude Sonnet 4 model ARN.

AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole managed policy required for VPC-attached Lambda

S3 bucket permissions use wildcard actions for object operations - required for image upload/download. OpenSearch permissions use wildcard for collection and index access - required for search operations. Bedrock permissions scoped to specific Claude Sonnet 4 model ARN.

AWS managed policies (AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole, AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole) are acceptable for Lambda execution roles
